name: Ministry of Finance IFMIS
description: Integrated Financial Management Information System used by the Ministry of Finance for budget tracking and reporting.
notes: Primary financial reporting integration. Sync runs at 06:00 CAT daily.

name: Bank of Zambia Payment System
description: Bank of Zambia real-time gross settlement system for interbank transfers and dividend payments.
notes: Used for dividend remittances and inter-SOE transfers.

name: Lusaka Stock Exchange (LuSE)
description: LuSE market data feed for listed IDC portfolio companies (ZCCM-IH, ZANACO).
notes: End-of-day market data sync after exchange close.

name: Zambia Revenue Authority (ZRA) TaxOnline
description: ZRA TaxOnline portal integration for SOE tax compliance monitoring and filing status.
notes: Weekly sync for tax compliance dashboard.
